raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Set the frame","name":"What feels most important to sort out between AZPocket and CoE UX/UI right now?","description":"Lets Carl name the main tension and choose the frame before digging into details.","purpose":"topic","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision pressure","name":"Where are the two workstreams asking you to make the hardest tradeoff?","description":"Surfaces the specific point where split focus is forcing a choice.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Stuck handoff","name":"What is getting stuck in the handoff between the two groups?","description":"Looks for the coordination break that is slowing progress across AZPocket and CoE UX/UI.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Stakeholder sync","name":"Who needs the clearest update from you this week?","description":"Checks where stakeholder alignment matters most and whether anyone is at risk of being surprised.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Protect the work","name":"What are you choosing to protect time for next?","description":"Forces a prioritization call and reveals what he is intentionally keeping alive.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Drop or defer","name":"What is easiest to defer without hurting either stream?","description":"Surfaces a real tradeoff and what can safely slip.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Need from me","name":"What do you need from me to keep both sides moving?","description":"Invites a concrete ask for air cover, decisions, or prioritization support.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next two weeks","name":"What would make the next two weeks feel cleaner for you?","description":"Closes on practical relief and a near-term adjustment rather than a new topic.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
